name: Backlog Size & Avg Age Over Time
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.full_date AS report_date,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_size' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END) AS backlog_size,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_avg_age_days' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END) AS avg_age_days
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('backlog_size', 'backlog_avg_age_days')
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
GROUP BY v_facts.full_date
ORDER BY v_facts.full_date ASC
